title: UltimateWall
description: UltimateWall is a powerful and user-friendly Minecraft plugin designed to create protective barriers in your world
body:
UltimateWall is a powerful and user-friendly Minecraft plugin designed to create protective barriers in your world, enhancing gameplay by preventing unwanted block interactions and player entry in designated areas. With its intuitive features and customizable settings, UltimateWall is perfect for server administrators looking to maintain order and protect specific zones.

Key Features:
Customizable Barrier Creation: Players can place enchanted barrier blocks that create a protective zone, preventing other players from breaking or placing blocks within the defined area.

Smooth Player Interaction: When players attempt to enter a protected area, they are gently pushed away instead of suffocating, ensuring a seamless and enjoyable experience.

Visual Effects: The plugin includes stunning particle effects that enhance the appearance of the barriers, making them visually appealing and easily identifiable.

Configurable Settings: Administrators can customize various settings, including the size of the protection range, the type of barrier block used, and whether particle effects are enabled.

Performance Optimized: Designed with efficiency in mind, UltimateWall minimizes server lag and resource usage, ensuring smooth gameplay even on busy servers.

Easy Command Interface: Players can easily obtain barrier blocks and manage their permissions through simple commands, making it accessible for all users.

Permissions:
ultimatewall.place: Allows players to place UltimateWall barrier blocks.

Default: Granted to all players.
ultimatewall.use: Allows players to use the /wall give command to obtain barrier blocks and access other functionalities.

Default: Granted to server operators (OPs).
ultimatewall.admin: Grants access to administrative commands, including the ability to reload the plugin configuration and toggle bypass permissions.

Default: Granted to server operators (OPs).
ultimatewall.bypass: Allows players to bypass the protection zones, enabling them to enter protected areas without restrictions.

Default: Not granted to any players by default.
Use Cases:
Event Management: Protect areas during events or competitions to prevent interference from players not participating.
Spawn Protection: Secure spawn points or important locations from unwanted block modifications.
Building Protection: Allow players to create personal zones where they can build without the risk of others disrupting their work.
